description:
Onlook lets you visually edit your React websites or webapps and write your changes back to code in real-time.


What's Changed
- Upgrade to Sonnet 4
- Bump electron from 35.0.2 to 36.0.1 by @dependabot in #1821
- Publish version v0.2.29 by @Kitenite in #1811
Full Changelog: https://github.com/onlook-dev/onlook/compare/v0.2.29...v0.2.30
